name: Timeworn Blade

granted_abilities.name: Strong Guard
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may discard this upgrade to reduce the damage by 2.

granted_actions.name: Blade Storm
granted_actions.effects: Deal either 2 damage to enemy models within (melee)2" or deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)4" of this model. Damage from this action ignores (fortitude) abilities. Discard this upgrade.

granted_actions.name: "Take This!"
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose an Artifact upgrade attached to this model. Ally only.
granted_actions.effects: Attach the chosen upgrade to the target.

extraction_notes: Blade Storm action has an asterisk (*) in the Rg column, interpreted as variable range with two damage options based on melee range
The fortitude icon in 'ignores (fortitude) abilities' rendered as (fortitude)
